message:
🌱 Add n8n: Slack Trigger node throws errors on `File Shared` event mission (#1442)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-11994-slack-trigger-node-throws-errors-on-file-shared-event",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: Slack Trigger node throws errors on `File Shared` event",
+    "description": "Slack Trigger node throws errors on `File Shared` event. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\n### Bug Description\n\nSlack Trigger node throws erros when listening on `File Shared` event:\n\n`TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'channel') at WebhookContext.webhook"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Slack Trigger node throws errors on `File Shared` event",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nThis PR fixes a critical bug in the Slack Trigger node where `file_share` events were throwing `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'channel')` errors. The issue occurred because the `file_share` event structure in Slack uses a `channel_id` attribute that wasn't being handled by the existing channel detection logic.\n\n- Added support for `req.body.event.channel_id` as a fallback option when determining the event channel\n- Improved null safety with optional\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Slack Trigger node throws errors on `File Shared`… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nThis PR fixes a critical bug in the Slack Trigger node where `file_share` events were throwing `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'channel')` errors. The issue occurred because the `file_share` event structure in Slack uses a `channel_id` attribute that wasn't being handled by the existing channel detection logic.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
